text:
Trace (, rom. Torēsu) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows the caster to view the target's location at all times.
__NOTOC__

|

Summary

This spell allows the caster to monitor the current position of the player it was used on at all times. The effect is rescinded when the target player leaves the game.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1027 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名の現在位置を常に知ることができる。（対象プレイヤーがゲーム外に出るまで効果は継続する。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1027 :: Trace 
1 named target player's current position will always be known. (Effect is continuous unless the target player leaves the game.)
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 128, Latarza used this spell on Killua shortly after the latter entered Greed Island.
The card's first appearance in the Hunter × Hunter 1999 series is Episode 74.
The card's conversion limit in the manga and 2011 anime is 90, while in the 1999 anime it is 80.
